title: calandrinia polyandra
intro: Calandrinia polyandra, also known as Red Maire or Mountain Spinach, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Calandrinia polyandra include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Calandrinia polyandra can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
